data.Fillers: Banana, Banana, 250g Peanut Butter, 75g Chia Seeds, 200g Powder{Protein Powder|Flour}, Dates
data.Instructions:
Mix 2 bananas, 250g peanut butter, 75g milled chia seeds, 200g powder (protein powder, flour, or similar), 40g maple syrup, and dates.

Put the mixture in baking paper inside a freezer-safe container and smoosh down to compact.

Add hot water to the dates and smoosh into a paste. Spread a layer of the date mixture on top.

Freeze for 1 hour.

Melt dark chocolate in a bowl over a pan on the stove and spread on top.

Freeze for 1 hour.

Store in the fridge or freezer as wanted.

Cut up vegetables.

Pan fry vegetables.

Add condiments to water.

Put fried vegetables into water.

Simmer in pot for ages.
